description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs an apt-get update and installs the default JDK, then runs npm install and npm run setup in a before_script. Add a job named test:lts that uses the node:carbon Docker image and executes npm run test. The job runs in the default test stage and has no additional caches, artifacts, or rules. Ensure the pipeline uses the before_script for all jobs and the node:carbon image only for the test:lts job.
